mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookstore.orders (user_id,total_price, order_date, status) VALUES (#{userId},#{finalPrice}, #{orderDate}, #{status})
INSERT INTO bookstore.order_details (order_id, book_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId},#{bookId},#{quantity},#{price})
mapper.update: UPDATE bookstore.orders SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.name AS realName, o.total_price AS finalPrice, o.order_date AS orderDate, o.status AS status FROM bookstore.orders o LEFT JOIN bookstore.users u ON o.user_id = u.user_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT od.book_id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, b.cover_image AS coverImage, od.quantity AS quantity, od.price AS price FROM bookstore.order_details od LEFT JOIN bookstore.books b ON od.book_id = b.book_id WHERE od.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT * FROM bookstore.orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY order_date DESC
